text: £3 DNS101- Key Terms - Don't switch off! @msumnane @ s * DNS Zone .. a database e.g. *.netflix.com containing records . e ZoneFile .. the "file" storing the zone on disk e Name Server (NS) .. a DNS server which hosts 1 or more ﬁ Zones .. and stores 1 or more ZoneFiles : ¢ Authoritative .. contains real/genuine records (boss) * Non-Authoritative/cached ... copies of records/zones stored / elsewhere to speed things up y
